rationale: The proposed change concerns the Tax Code homestead exemption amount. Educ. Code §37.0095 governs student disciplinary action for antisemitic behavior. The two provisions address entirely unrelated subjects with no operational overlap.
quote: In taking disciplinary action against a student for behavior that violates the student code of conduct adopted under Section 37.001 and that may reasonably be determined to have been motivated by antisemitism, a school district or open-enrollment charter school shall use the definition of antisemitism provided by Section 448.001, Government Code
_note: No conflict. The rule_text is about student discipline for antisemitism; the proposed change is about property tax homestead exemption amounts. No statutory or operational relationship exists between the two.
